entry.em: ..EXTREME HEAT WARNING IN EFFECT UNTIL 8 PM CDT FRIDAY

entry.data:
MOSTLY CLEAR
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE UPPER 70S
SOUTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

SUNNY WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 90S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
HIGHEST HEAT INDEX READINGS HEAT INDEX READINGS UP TO 109 IN THE AFTERNOON

CLEAR WITH LOWS IN THE MID 70S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY, HOT WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 90S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
HIGHEST HEAT INDEX READINGS HEAT INDEX READINGS UP TO 107 IN THE AFTERNOON

CLEAR WITH LOWS IN THE MID 70S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR
HOT
HIGHS IN THE MID 90S
LOWS IN THE MID 70S

MOSTLY CLEAR
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING
LOWS IN THE MID 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE MID 90S
LOWS IN THE MID 70S

PARTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS AROUND 90
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT
